description: Static benchmark scenarios that prove design alternatives differ on real axes before they are presented as distinct directions.

cases.intent: regulated-trust operational dashboard that must feel calm without becoming generic SaaS
cases.brief: A compliance operations dashboard for legal and finance teams reviewing high-risk cases.

variants.label: Quiet ledger

axes.palette: warm grayscale with restrained mineral green
axes.typography: humanist serif display with neutral sans body
axes.imagery: document texture and audit stamp motifs
axes.hierarchy: case-first dense tables with calm evidence rails
axes.density: high density with generous row rhythm
axes.composition: split review desk with persistent decision column
axes.interaction: keyboard-first queue triage and inline evidence expansion

variants.differsBecause: prioritizes legal review calm and document credibility

evidence.referencePacket: creative-regulated-trust plus direct competitor convention map
evidence.screenshotPlan: desktop queue, mobile case detail, error state
evidence.tokenNotes: semantic risk colors limited to status and decision chips

variants.label: Command center

axes.palette: deep neutral shell with amber and cyan operational signals
axes.typography: condensed grotesk headings with tabular sans body
axes.motion: measured panel reveals and alert acknowledgement
axes.imagery: network topology and evidence graph motifs
axes.hierarchy: alert-first dashboard with active incident lane
axes.density: very high density with compact modules
axes.composition: three-column cockpit with live activity rail
axes.interaction: command palette and keyboard shortcuts for review actions

variants.differsBecause: frames compliance review as real-time operations
variants.gains: faster scanning and stronger command posture

evidence.screenshotPlan: desktop cockpit, compact mobile alerts, loading state
evidence.tokenNotes: signal colors reserve saturation for active risk only

variants.label: Review room

axes.palette: soft paper background with ink blue and muted burgundy
axes.typography: editorial serif headings with readable legal sans
axes.motion: page-turn micro transitions and quiet focus shifts
axes.imagery: case folder, margin note, and witness board cues
axes.density: medium density with larger reading zones
axes.composition: timeline spine with contextual evidence drawers
axes.interaction: annotated reading flow and guided decision checkpoints

variants.differsBecause: turns the task into a deliberation room instead of a dashboard
variants.gains: better comprehension for complex case narratives

evidence.tokenNotes: burgundy appears only for material risk and never body text

cases.intent: high-memorability AI product launch without purple-gradient sameness
cases.brief: A launch page for an AI tool that generates campaign concepts for brand teams.

variants.label: Studio wall

axes.palette: gallery white, charcoal ink, vermilion accent
axes.typography: large editorial serif with compact grotesk controls
axes.imagery: campaign tear sheets and studio wall references
axes.density: medium density with oversized artifact previews

variants.differsBecause: positions AI as a creative studio assistant

evidence.screenshotPlan: desktop hero, mobile board stack, comparison state
evidence.tokenNotes: vermilion accent used for generation action only

variants.label: Signal lab

axes.palette: soft black, phosphor green, pale lilac neutrals
axes.typography: mono-inflected display with geometric sans body
axes.motion: signal scanlines and progressive prompt refinement
axes.imagery: waveforms, prompt traces, and lab instrument panels
axes.composition: lab bench with stacked diagnostic panels
axes.interaction: prompt tuning sliders and live result deltas

variants.differsBecause: leans into experimentation and prompt instrumentation

evidence.screenshotPlan: desktop lab, mobile prompt stack, loading trace
evidence.tokenNotes: phosphor is interaction state, not decorative glow

variants.label: Campaign stage

axes.palette: midnight blue, warm spotlight gold, porcelain surfaces
axes.typography: cinematic display sans with high-contrast body
axes.imagery: stage, cue cards, and campaign scene framing
axes.composition: full-bleed stage scenes with anchored controls
axes.interaction: scenario selector that changes the full visual scene

variants.differsBecause: sells campaign imagination through theatrical framing
variants.givesUp: dense product proof above the fold

evidence.screenshotPlan: desktop stage, mobile scene selector, reduced-motion frame
evidence.tokenNotes: gold appears as light behavior and CTA focus, not a full palette wash

cases.intent: developer tool that avoids famous-product mimicry
cases.brief: An observability product for backend teams debugging distributed jobs.

variants.label: Trace map

axes.palette: graphite, cool white, electric blue trace accents
axes.typography: technical grotesk with tabular metric numerals
axes.motion: trace paths animate only on focus
axes.interaction: click path to isolate logs and metrics

variants.differsBecause: makes system topology the core mental model

evidence.referencePacket: creative-devtools plus app-interface data grid guidance
evidence.tokenNotes: blue is reserved for active trace path

variants.label: Job ledger

axes.palette: ink navy, ledger paper, severity rust
axes.typography: monospace labels with bookish serif section markers
axes.motion: row state changes snap without flourish
axes.imagery: ledger rows and audit trail markers
axes.hierarchy: job list and retry history first
axes.interaction: bulk command review with confirmation rails

variants.differsBecause: treats jobs as auditable financial-style records
variants.gains: confidence in retry and recovery decisions

evidence.screenshotPlan: job table, retry drawer, bulk action focus state
evidence.tokenNotes: rust only marks destructive or failed retries

axes.palette: near-black, warm terminal green, desaturated slate
axes.typography: terminal mono with plain sans explanatory copy
axes.motion: streaming logs with reduced-motion freeze mode
axes.hierarchy: live stream and command response first
axes.density: high density with compact command zones
axes.composition: terminal wall with contextual runbook cards
axes.interaction: command palette, log filters, and runbook pinning

evidence.screenshotPlan: terminal wall, command palette, reduced-motion stream
evidence.tokenNotes: terminal green is functional active state, not decorative matrix effect

cases.intent: health app with warmth but regulated trust restraint
cases.brief: A mobile-native coaching app for patients tracking recovery habits after treatment.

axes.typography: rounded humanist sans with gentle serif quotes
axes.motion: soft check-in transitions with reduced-motion stills
axes.imagery: journal cards and care note motifs
axes.density: low density with large touch targets
axes.interaction: guided check-in and reassuring progress review

evidence.screenshotPlan: iOS home, Android check-in, empty state
evidence.tokenNotes: sage indicates care progress, not medical status severity

variants.label: Clinical companion

axes.palette: clear white, medical blue, restrained coral warning
axes.typography: legible system sans with numeric clarity
axes.imagery: plain clinical icons and care-plan structure
axes.composition: task dashboard with clinician note panel

variants.differsBecause: keeps the experience closer to clinical plan compliance

evidence.screenshotPlan: task dashboard, reminder settings, warning state
evidence.tokenNotes: coral only for care escalation and never success

variants.label: Recovery path

axes.palette: mist blue, leaf green, stone neutrals
axes.typography: friendly geometric sans with large numeric milestones
axes.motion: path progress fills and haptic-like micro confirmation
axes.imagery: path, milestone, and gentle environment cues
axes.hierarchy: weekly milestone path before daily checklist
axes.composition: vertical journey path with habit modules
axes.interaction: milestone reveal and habit streak repair

variants.differsBecause: makes recovery feel like guided progress

evidence.screenshotPlan: journey path, habit detail, error recovery
evidence.tokenNotes: green shows completion only with text and icon support

cases.intent: analytics landing page that shows real product state rather than abstract gradient SaaS
cases.brief: A public page for a customer analytics warehouse tool used by growth teams.

variants.label: Warehouse cutaway

axes.typography: engineered slab headings with readable sans body
axes.motion: data crates route through pipeline cutaway
axes.interaction: pipeline stage hover reveals metric meaning

variants.differsBecause: uses a memorable physical metaphor for data movement

evidence.screenshotPlan: hero, hover stage, mobile proof stack
evidence.tokenNotes: orange marks pipeline action and not general decoration

variants.label: Growth newsroom

axes.palette: newsprint white, deep ink, bright chart magenta
axes.typography: editorial headline face with compact chart labels
axes.motion: headline ticker changes and chart reveals
axes.composition: editorial front page with data panels
axes.interaction: switch campaign story and inspect metric source

variants.differsBecause: frames analytics as publishable growth stories

evidence.screenshotPlan: front page, metric source drawer, empty report
evidence.tokenNotes: magenta is chart callout only and has accessible text fallback

variants.label: Control plane

axes.palette: dark graphite, pale cyan, white data surfaces
axes.typography: precise grotesk with tabular dashboard numerals
axes.motion: panels dock and undock with restrained easing
axes.imagery: actual dashboard states and schema map
axes.hierarchy: live interface preview before narrative copy
axes.interaction: filter preview updates product screenshot state

variants.differsBecause: makes the product UI the first-viewport signal

evidence.screenshotPlan: desktop cockpit, mobile compressed UI, loading skeleton
evidence.tokenNotes: cyan only for active data focus and keyboard ring
